reviews.comment:
Pésimo trato. No cumplen con el protocolo de atención. Los domingos que hay mucha gente, parece que lo hicieran aproposito. Pero lo peor es que no te cumplen con con lo puntos del serviclub. Cero en turismo, y cero en servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. They don't follow the service protocol. On Sundays when it's busy, it seems like they do it on purpose. But the worst part is that they don't honor your service club points. Zero for tourism, and zero for service.
